Text: GitHubのコマンドラインツール「GitHub CLI 1.0」、正式リリース。コマンドラインからIssueやプルリクなど実行可能 － Publickey https://t.co/lwAsPp1rYa

Tried this with empty app and eqrcode, surprisingly easy to use! 
Compatible with Key URI Format-compliant auth apps (Google/Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, etc).
Intend to send proposal and patch on extending it to support 8-digit variant, when I got time. https://t.co/bgBVnw4brv
